## What

<!-- The skill added or changed, one line. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` — frontmatter `name` matches the directory, is a valid slug, and `description` is present
- [ ] English-only — SKILL.md, catalog, examples, and trigger phrases (no German or other non-English)
- [ ] No internal references — names, private tracking IDs, machine paths, or context-bound war-stories
- [ ] Marketplace entry added/updated in `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`
- [ ] `scripts/validate.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Read once as a stranger would — does it stand without private context?
